title: yahab #3051
definition:
1) to give, provide, ascribe, come
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to give
        1a2) to set, place
        1a3) to provide (with reflexive)
        1a4) to ascribe (glory)
        1a5) to grant, permit, come now
